summary: The income tax officers are not supposed to seize any gold jewellery within the limits specified, irrespective of the level of standard of living or the status of the person in society being raided.

title: SEBI takes aim at curbing portfolio overlaps: Here’s what it means for mutual fund investors
summary: If one fund in your portfolio underperforms, there's a high probability that the others may also perform similarly. Because of these overlaps, what appears to be a well-diversified portfolio may actually be concentrated.

title: Should I pay tax when short-term capital gains are my only income?
summary: If your total income does not exceed the basic exemption limit, no tax liability may arise.

title: A new fund category aims to take timing decisions out of investors’ hands
summary: Life cycle funds will automatically shift asset allocation as investors move closer to financial goals, replacing existing retirement and children’s mutual fund categories.

title: Pick broad market indices over themes for passive investing, says Angel One AMC's Hemen Bhatia

title: Sebi unveils life-cycle mutual funds; solution-oriented schemes scrapped — what it means for your portfolio
summary: Mutual funds will now be permitted to offer both value and contra mutual funds as long as the scheme portfolio overlap between the two schemes is not more than 50%.

title: From youth dividend to credit ready: How India’s Yuva Shakti Budget impacts first-time borrowers
summary: India's Union Budget emphasizes youth empowerment and entrepreneurship, recognizing the potential of its young population as a key driver of economic growth.
